source_doc.title: ADA Standards for Accessible Design & PROWAG

rules.name: Sidewalk Width Physical Minimum
rules.description: Minimum physically passable width
rules.error_message: Sidewalk width below absolute minimum (3 ft)

rules.name: Sidewalk Width ADA Minimum
rules.description: ADA minimum sidewalk width for accessibility
rules.error_message: Sidewalk width below ADA minimum (4 ft)

rules.name: Sidewalk Width AASHTO Recommendation
rules.description: AASHTO recommended minimum for comfortable pedestrian flow
rules.error_message: Sidewalk width below AASHTO recommended 5 ft

rules.name: Clear Width ADA Minimum
rules.description: Minimum clear width for wheelchair passage (single direction)
rules.error_message: Clear width below ADA minimum (3 ft)

rules.name: Clear Width Two-Way Passing
rules.description: Recommended clear width for two wheelchairs to pass
rules.error_message: Clear width insufficient for two-way wheelchair passing (5 ft)

rules.name: Cross Slope ADA Maximum
rules.description: Maximum cross slope for accessibility
rules.error_message: Cross slope exceeds ADA maximum (2%)

rules.name: Running Slope Non-Ramp Maximum
rules.description: Running slope exceeding 5% requires ramp treatment
rules.error_message: Running slope exceeds 5% - may require ramp treatment

rules.name: Running Slope Ramp Maximum
rules.description: Maximum running slope for ramps (1:12)
rules.error_message: Running slope exceeds maximum ramp slope (8.33%)

rules.name: Buffer Width Recommendation
rules.description: Recommended buffer between sidewalk and travel lanes
rules.error_message: Buffer width below recommended 2 ft minimum

rules.name: Curb Height Physical Range
rules.description: Curb height must be within physical limits
rules.error_message: Curb height outside physical range (0-8 in)

rules.name: Sidewalk Detection Confidence
rules.description: Minimum confidence for reliable sidewalk detection
rules.error_message: Low sidewalk detection confidence - manual review recommended

rules.name: Crosswalk Width MUTCD Minimum
rules.description: Minimum crosswalk width per MUTCD
rules.error_message: Crosswalk width below MUTCD minimum (6 ft)

rules.name: Crosswalk Width Preferred
rules.description: Preferred crosswalk width for high pedestrian volumes
rules.error_message: Crosswalk width below preferred 10 ft for visibility

rules.name: Crosswalk Length Physical Range
rules.description: Crossing distance must be physically reasonable
rules.error_message: Crosswalk length outside physical limits

rules.name: Stripe Width MUTCD Range
rules.description: Standard crosswalk stripe width per MUTCD
rules.error_message: Stripe width outside MUTCD range (6-24 in)

rules.name: Curb Ramp Width ADA Minimum
rules.description: Minimum curb ramp width excluding flared sides
rules.error_message: Curb ramp width below ADA minimum (3 ft)

rules.name: Curb Ramp Width Preferred
rules.description: Preferred curb ramp width for accessibility
rules.error_message: Curb ramp width below preferred 4 ft

rules.name: Curb Ramp Slope ADA Maximum
rules.description: Maximum curb ramp slope (1:12)
rules.error_message: Curb ramp slope exceeds ADA maximum (8.33%)

rules.name: Flare Slope ADA Maximum
rules.description: Maximum flared side slope (1:10)
rules.error_message: Flare slope exceeds ADA maximum (10%)

rules.name: Landing Width ADA Minimum
rules.description: Minimum landing width at top of curb ramp
rules.error_message: Landing width below ADA minimum (4 ft)

rules.name: Landing Depth ADA Minimum
rules.description: Minimum landing depth at top of curb ramp
rules.error_message: Landing depth below ADA minimum (4 ft)

rules.name: Crossing Time Formula Check
rules.description: Crossing time should allow 3.5 ft/sec walking speed (ADA)
rules.error_message: Crossing time insufficient for ADA walking speed (3.5 ft/sec)

rules.name: Crosswalk Detection Confidence
rules.description: Minimum confidence for reliable crosswalk detection
rules.error_message: Low crosswalk detection confidence - manual review recommended

rules.name: Marking Visibility Minimum
rules.description: Minimum visibility score for safe crosswalk markings
rules.error_message: Low marking visibility - maintenance may be needed
